title: Rich Roasted Canadian Ground Beef Lasagna
description: A rich and energizing Canadian dish featuring ground beef, cheese, and ground pistachios, with a unique binchotan-charcoal flavor, this lasagna is a low-calorie-friendly option for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, brown the ground beef over medium-high heat.
Add the ground pistachios and binchotan-charcoal powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, and parmesan cheese.
Spread a layer of marinara sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the cheese mixture over the noodles.
Repeat the layers, starting with the meat mixture, then the noodles, then the remaining cheese mixture.
Top the lasagna with the remaining marinara sauce and mozzarella cheese.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F.
